message:
test(core): property-based tests for undo, explanations, agent_correlator, backpressure_severity

- proptest_undo: 12 tests covering UndoOutcome serde, UndoExecutionResult serde, UndoRequest builder
- proptest_explanations: 24 tests covering template lookup, category filtering, render/format invariants
- proptest_agent_correlator: 9 tests covering DetectionSource serde, AgentCorrelator lifecycle
- proptest_backpressure_severity: 23 tests covering SeverityConfig serde, ThrottleActions range/monotonicity, ContinuousBackpressure behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
